form.formComment: Comes here off a 44-day let-up. Last start second last of 8 at Kenilworth on February 25 over 1000m, 7 len behind Trois Sept Huit with 55.1kg at $67. The start before that 8th of 10 at Durbanville on February 14 over 1250m, 6 len behind Ebisu with 60kg at $34. Can make amends.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of nine weeks and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation third of 8 at Fairview All Weather February 3 over 1400m, 1.75 len behind Ocean Flame carrying 59kg at $3. Previously first up; second of 10 at Fairview All Weather September 12 over 1300m, 1.3 len behind Lady Bomber with 53.5kg at $17. Expected to prove hard to beat.
